nasb.text: If anyone asks you, ‘Why are you untying it?’ you shall say, ‘The Lord has need of it.’ ”

esv.text: If anyone asks you, ‘Why are you untying it?’ you shall say this: ‘The Lord has need of it.’”

cnv.text: 如果有人問為甚麼解開牠，你們要這樣說：‘主需要牠。’”

ccb.text: 若有人问你们为什么把它解开，就说，‘主要用它。’”

csbs.text: 如果有人问你们为什么解开它，你们就这样说‘主需要它。’”
